display_name: 鍏斿瓙闀滃皬鍓у満 / Rabbit Mirror Theater锛堢偣鑿淨R涓嬭浇锛嬪叏閾捐矾璇婃柇娴嬭瘯鐗堬級
author: Toto
description: TEST build: adds a local download button for the expandable RabbitMirror Quick Replies ordering tree. The bundled QR creates a latest-pending, one-use order that expires after the next RabbitMirror actually adopts it. The QR is a static asset and is never injected into model context. Retains 101 thematic elements, 177 presentation formats, data-active group-state rescue, media-native interaction, full-chain diagnostic, source recovery, thinking isolation, readability safeguards, dark-background cooldown, and all existing rescue routes.
